name: IRD official example - HK$480,000 married
description: Matches IRD PAM39 guide example Q5: same HK$480,000 income but with married person's allowance HK$264,000. Tax = HK$15,720.

sources.description: IRD PAM39 Guide worked example Q5: Income 480000, MPF 18000, Net income 462000, Married allowance 264000, NCI 198000. Progressive: 50000*2% + 50000*6% + 50000*10% + 48000*14% = 1000+3000+5000+6720 = 15720. Standard: 462000*15% = 69300. Tax = 15720 (progressive lower).
